// This file was generated from JSON Schema using quicktype, do not modify it directly.
// To parse the JSON, add this file to your project and do:
//
//   let user = try User(json)

import Foundation

// MARK: - User
struct User {
    let id: Int
    let name, email: String
    let roles: [String]
    let profile: Profile
}

// MARK: - Profile
struct Profile {
    let age: Int
    let active: Bool
}
